TypeSignature.Value: .class public interface auto ansi abstract beforefieldinit IHostedFileClient implements class System.IDisposable

Docs.summary: Represents a client for uploading, downloading, and managing files hosted by an AI service.

remarks.para: File clients enable interaction with server-side file storage used by AI services, particularly for code interpreter inputs and outputs. Files uploaded through this interface can be referenced in AI requests using .

Unless otherwise specified, all members of are thread-safe for concurrent use. It is expected that all implementations of support being used by multiple requests concurrently. Instances must not be disposed of while the instance is still in use.

MemberSignature.Value: public System.Threading.Tasks.Task<bool> DeleteAsync (string fileId, Microsoft.Extensions.AI.HostedFileClientOptions? options = default, System.Threading.CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

.method public hidebysig newslot virtual instance class System.Threading.Tasks.Task`1<bool> DeleteAsync(string fileId, class Microsoft.Extensions.AI.HostedFileClientOptions options, valuetype System.Threading.CancellationToken cancellationToken) cil managed
Public Function DeleteAsync (fileId As String, Optional options As HostedFileClientOptions = Nothing, Optional cancellationToken As CancellationToken = Nothing) As Task(Of Boolean)
abstract member DeleteAsync : string * Microsoft.Extensions.AI.HostedFileClientOptions * System.Threading.CancellationToken -> System.Threading.Tasks.Task<bool>

Docs.param: The ID of the file to delete.
The to monitor for cancellation requests. The default is .
Docs.summary: Deletes a file from the AI service.
Docs.returns: if the file was deleted; if the file was not found.

MemberSignature.Value: public System.Threading.Tasks.Task<Microsoft.Extensions.AI.HostedFileDownloadStream> DownloadAsync (string fileId, Microsoft.Extensions.AI.HostedFileClientOptions? options = default, System.Threading.CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

.method public hidebysig newslot virtual instance class System.Threading.Tasks.Task`1<class Microsoft.Extensions.AI.HostedFileDownloadStream> DownloadAsync(string fileId, class Microsoft.Extensions.AI.HostedFileClientOptions options, valuetype System.Threading.CancellationToken cancellationToken) cil managed
Public Function DownloadAsync (fileId As String, Optional options As HostedFileClientOptions = Nothing, Optional cancellationToken As CancellationToken = Nothing) As Task(Of HostedFileDownloadStream)

abstract member DownloadAsync : string * Microsoft.Extensions.AI.HostedFileClientOptions * System.Threading.CancellationToken -> System.Threading.Tasks.Task<Microsoft.Extensions.AI.HostedFileDownloadStream>

Docs.param: The ID of the file to download.
The to monitor for cancellation requests. The default is .
Docs.summary: Downloads a file from the AI service.
Docs.returns: A containing the file content. The stream should be disposed when no longer needed.

MemberSignature.Value: public System.Threading.Tasks.Task<Microsoft.Extensions.AI.HostedFileContent?> GetFileInfoAsync (string fileId, Microsoft.Extensions.AI.HostedFileClientOptions? options = default, System.Threading.CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

.method public hidebysig newslot virtual instance class System.Threading.Tasks.Task`1<class Microsoft.Extensions.AI.HostedFileContent> GetFileInfoAsync(string fileId, class Microsoft.Extensions.AI.HostedFileClientOptions options, valuetype System.Threading.CancellationToken cancellationToken) cil managed
Public Function GetFileInfoAsync (fileId As String, Optional options As HostedFileClientOptions = Nothing, Optional cancellationToken As CancellationToken = Nothing) As Task(Of HostedFileContent)

abstract member GetFileInfoAsync : string * Microsoft.Extensions.AI.HostedFileClientOptions * System.Threading.CancellationToken -> System.Threading.Tasks.Task<Microsoft.Extensions.AI.HostedFileContent>

Docs.param: The to monitor for cancellation requests. The default is .
Docs.returns: Information about the file, or if not found.

MemberSignature.Value: public object? GetService (Type serviceType, object? serviceKey = default);
.method public hidebysig newslot virtual instance object GetService(class System.Type serviceType, object serviceKey) cil managed
Public Function GetService (serviceType As Type, Optional serviceKey As Object = Nothing) As Object
abstract member GetService : Type * obj -> obj

Docs.param: The type of object being requested.
An optional key that can be used to help identify the target service.
Docs.summary: Asks the for an object of the specified type .
Docs.remarks: The purpose of this method is to allow for the retrieval of strongly typed services that might be provided by the , including itself or any services it might be wrapping. For example, to access the for the instance, may be used to request it.

MemberSignature.Value: public System.Collections.Generic.IAsyncEnumerable<Microsoft.Extensions.AI.HostedFileContent> ListFilesAsync (Microsoft.Extensions.AI.HostedFileClientOptions? options = default, System.Threading.CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

.method public hidebysig newslot virtual instance class System.Collections.Generic.IAsyncEnumerable`1<class Microsoft.Extensions.AI.HostedFileContent> ListFilesAsync(class Microsoft.Extensions.AI.HostedFileClientOptions options, valuetype System.Threading.CancellationToken cancellationToken) cil managed
Public Function ListFilesAsync (Optional options As HostedFileClientOptions = Nothing, Optional cancellationToken As CancellationToken = Nothing) As IAsyncEnumerable(Of HostedFileContent)

abstract member ListFilesAsync : Microsoft.Extensions.AI.HostedFileClientOptions * System.Threading.CancellationToken -> System.Collections.Generic.IAsyncEnumerable<Microsoft.Extensions.AI.HostedFileContent>

Docs.param: The to monitor for cancellation requests. The default is .
Docs.summary: Lists files accessible by this client.
Docs.returns: An async enumerable of file information.

MemberSignature.Value: public System.Threading.Tasks.Task<Microsoft.Extensions.AI.HostedFileContent> UploadAsync (System.IO.Stream content, string? mediaType = default, string? fileName = default, Microsoft.Extensions.AI.HostedFileClientOptions? options = default, System.Threading.CancellationToken cancellationToken = default);

.method public hidebysig newslot virtual instance class System.Threading.Tasks.Task`1<class Microsoft.Extensions.AI.HostedFileContent> UploadAsync(class System.IO.Stream content, string mediaType, string fileName, class Microsoft.Extensions.AI.HostedFileClientOptions options, valuetype System.Threading.CancellationToken cancellationToken) cil managed

Public Function UploadAsync (content As Stream, Optional mediaType As String = Nothing, Optional fileName As String = Nothing, Optional options As HostedFileClientOptions = Nothing, Optional cancellationToken As CancellationToken = Nothing) As Task(Of HostedFileContent)

abstract member UploadAsync : System.IO.Stream * string * string * Microsoft.Extensions.AI.HostedFileClientOptions * System.Threading.CancellationToken -> System.Threading.Tasks.Task<Microsoft.Extensions.AI.HostedFileContent>

Docs.param: The stream containing the file content to upload.
The media type (MIME type) of the content.
The to monitor for cancellation requests. The default is .
Docs.summary: Uploads a file to the AI service.
Docs.exception: is not a valid media type.
